revision.comment: Bot: fix merged QID Q11408858 → Q7882536 apply
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:単立]]


A Standalone Shrine (単立) is a shrine tthat is not part odf the [[Association of Shinto Shrines]]

==overview==

{{Source notice|date=December 20, 2017 (Wed) 09:32 (UTC)}}
'''Tachiritsu''' (単立) refers to an independent religious organization (temples, shrines, etc.) that does not belong to a {{ill|unit religious corporation|ja|単位宗教法人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/unit religious corporation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} or {{ill|Religious corporation|lt=Religious corporation|lt=Umbrella religious organization|ja|包括宗教法人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/umbrella religious organization|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗教法人}}.

== Overview ==

The term is mainly used to describe entities such as "independent temples" ({{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|qid=Q748|lt=Buddhism|1=Buddhism}}), "independent shrines" ({{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}), or "{{ill|Non-denominational Christianity|en|Non-denominational Christianity|qid=Q7049261|lt=independent churches|1=Non-denominational Christianity}}" ({{ill|Christianity|en|Christianity|qid=Q5043|lt=Christianity|1=Christianity}}). These organizations are exceptions to the implicit assumption that traditional religious {{ill|Buddhist temple|en|Buddhist temple|qid=Q5393308|lt=temples|1=Buddhist temple}}, {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}, and {{ill|churches|ja|教会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/churches|1=kyoukai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131122204}} belong to specific sects, denominations, or higher-level organizations.

An independent religious organization refers to a {{ill|unit religious organization|ja|単位宗教法人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/unit religious organization|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} that is not under the umbrella of any {{ill|Religious corporation|lt=Religious corporation|lt=Umbrella religious organization|ja|包括宗教団体|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/umbrella religious organization|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Among these, those recognized as {{ill|Religious corporation|lt=Religious corporation|lt=Religious corporations|ja|宗教法人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/religious corporations|qq=}} are called independent religious corporations.

A unit religious organization includes temples, shrines, churches, mission offices, and other entities within the scope defined by Article 2, Section 1 of the {{ill|Religious Corporations Act|ja|宗教法人法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Religious Corporations Act|1=Religious Corporation Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11451965}}. In contrast, an umbrella religious organization falls under Article 2, Section 2 of the same act and encompasses denominations, sects, and other groups that include unit religious organizations.

Being "independent" is primarily a legal issue. It does not necessarily imply doctrinal or ideological independence. For example, some independent organizations adhere to the {{ill|Dogma|en|Dogma|qid=Q620749|lt=doctrines|1=Dogma}} and {{ill|rituals|ja|儀礼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rituals|1=ritual|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q50726375}} of traditional {{ill|Schools of Buddhism|en|Schools of Buddhism|qid=Q222516|lt=Schools of Buddhism|1=Schools of Buddhism}} or {{ill|Religious denomination|en|Religious denomination|qid=Q13414953|lt=denominations|1=Religious denomination}}. In many cases, organizations become independent after disputes over {{ill|personnel|ja|人事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/personnel|1=personnel affairs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17232484}} or {{ill|Financial management|en|Financial management|qid=Q4738155|lt=finances|1=Financial management}} lead to their separation from umbrella religious organizations.


== See Also ==
* {{ill|Religious corporation|ja|宗教法人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Religious corporation|qq=}}
* {{ill|兼学|ja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/兼学|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (e.g., {{ill|Eight-sect compatibility|ja|八宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight-sect compatibility|qq=}}, {{ill|Two-sect compatibility|ja|二宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Two-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579233|1=Two-sect compatibility}}, {{ill|Three-sect compatibility|ja|三宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579234|1=Three-sect compatibility}}, {{ill|Four-sect compatibility|ja|四宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Four-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579235|1=Four-sect compatibility}}, {{ill|Five-sect compatibility|ja|五宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579236|1=Five-sect compatibility}}, {{ill|Tōdai-ji#Role in early Japanese Buddhism|lt=Six-sect compatibility|ja|六宗兼学|ja|六宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōdai-ji#Role in early Japanese Buddhism|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東大寺}}, {{ill|Seven-sect compatibility|ja|七宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seven-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579237|1=Seven-sect compatibility}}, {{ill|Ten-sect compatibility|ja|十宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579238|1=Ten-sect compatibility}}, {{ill|Thirteen-sect compatibility|ja|十三宗兼学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Thirteen-sect compatibility|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579239|1=Thirteen-sect compatibility}})<ref>[http://kyonoreijo.sakura.ne.jp/lib/sh/libsh4-8sk.htm Spiritual Sites in Kyoto: Four-sect Compatibility and Eight-sect Compatibility], [https://kotobank.jp/word/八宗兼学-602628 kotobank]</ref>
